item.title: A kiddy pool kind of joy
item.description: Just hoping to help you smile or mentally smirk today, even if only for a moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: JUNKO Body Paint - MCroft07
item.description:
The paint took me forever! I really wanted to add a touch of realism to it so I added in loads of fabric folds but then I got carried away and made the collar part of the illusion and the tie "fly" away and added a lot of shading to it. Regardless, I'm still really happy with how it turned out! I haven't played Danganronpa, I watched the anime but I thought it was pretty dull personally. I just liked her design and wanted to try paint it :) If you wanted to see more paints, I'm Mcroft07 everywhere. I don't post them all on here because I don't want to spam ? I had some confusion before, but I paint them myself, I'm the model and the artist. I just look in a mirror while I'm doing it and paint myself. I actually do it live on twitch for those people who refused to believe me ?
This is the character reference in case you aren't familiar with Junko
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.description: Buy another pair, ya rich MF Just hoping to help you smile or mentally smirk today, even if only for a moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1150 (old bay martini)
item.description:
I think I am in the minority of people that really like Turkish delight. Anyway. Let's get this bread.
My garbage disposal stopped working last night and now my dishwasher won't drain, but I'm terrified about contacting property management because apparently my panic attack from my car broke was too noisy and lead to a noise complaint, and "disturbing other residents can be grounds for eviction" (quote verbatim from the email I recieved) so now I'm freaking out about that. (but suuuuuper quietly, of course, and entirely internally, lest I disturb anyone.)
Love me some Appalachian murder ballads.
I really wish we had the list of what must be included here.
MOOD.
Oh this strikes me as a terrible idea.
Zoooop
If I had a soul mate, I'm pretty sure I already screwed that relationship up, but I'm also at this point completely apathetic about it.
Me this week.
Biiiig moood.
Zoom.
Robin hooded merganser
Ha ha, Phokas you fucked up.
Empress Wu Tang
We are currently in the second state.
New excuse.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Hey Pippin. Hey Pippin. [Kissing noises] "
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: My little nephew found me a rock and asked me "to show it to your friends on your phone."
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.title: Let's watch this person bathe a kitten!
item.description: Rinse rinse rinse Thanks to @TheFakeCraigFerguson for a saucy sauce! Their comment: https://www.instagram.com/heidiwranglescats . For more videos like this. She's based in New York and is a huge TNR and rescue advocate. She's got a cute little group right now named after musical symbols.
item.dc:creator: TheOneWhoWasLeft

item.title: An Overdue Dump
item.description:
I should not live in sub-rural Colorado with this trait, I'm in danger
I have an odd SCP thing going - I read them at night and ONLY in numerical order. I'm at 3327 right now.
My family is the "If you visit we will feed you" type
Also hopping
All treasures
Y'all know it's the truth
OK but my bestie lives several states away
I hope I am at least. I figure I'm at least the strange blue haired person who wears weird clothes and walks around the grocery store singing to themselves
I would pay so so SO much to see this just once
Life changing
Baaaaaby
These are the best
Please?
The sirens are a bad sign
Omg yes I want to try the cordials and all of it
A legend
I CAN'T HEAL YOU IF YOU'RE ALREADY DEAD
I've been attacked by this meemay
Mine now has a surprising number of metal covers. This second I'm listening to a metal cover of What Does The Fox Say? but the cover of Kiss From a Rose is also bomb
Ugh I WISH I could reach goblin king hotness as an enbie
... I've probably bought 7 versions. It's so good though
You'll likely miss it, but this is an example of the amazing camouflage capabilities of the Spoiled Rocky Mountain Mutt Hound
Our ducks Daisy, Bruno, and Helen
And as always, my beloved Jack
item.dc:creator: Painahimah

item.title: Cake, pastry - the knife stays in the box. Happy Saturday!
item.dc:creator: Irishtrailrunner

item.title: No papaya, only snuggles.
item.description:
Seriously, tho, get the cat off the damn counter.
Not my snuggle monster. Not my litter-sprinkled fruit. Thanks to @HillHobbitWoman for the source! The kitty is Juta. The dude runs an animal shelter called Zavestišce Horjul in Slovenia. Please help them out if you're able! https://www.facebook.com/share/J9bs3KuS8KuB87WS/?mibextid=qi2Omg
item.dc:creator: TheOneWhoWasLeft

item.title: Motion to replace Columbus statues with Columbo statues: Seconded
item.dc:creator: aDragon360

item.title: Sybil adopted an abandoned baby!
item.description:
A newborn baby was found in a bush. Someone bottle fed him for a few days before they brought him to me. Sybil was confused as to why baby smelled funny but he was crying and she said she feed all crying baby.
It took him a little while, but he figured out how to nurse! Imgurians have asked how to help my fosters. We are always in need of supplies! Here is a wishlist if you’d like to send some our way. :) https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/1CWKEHIN8OBJP?ref_=wl_shar
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88

item.title: We gotta protect this man at all costs!
